subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses and revealed that which lay concealed in the Books of old. Verily, He is the Single One, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و اظهر ما کان مستورا فی کتب القبل انه لهو الفرد الواحد العلیم الحکیم
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @consolation and comfort
